completion_summary: Mapped all 15 tasks and 28 operations through services, kernels, 20 providers, ledgers, roles, maturity and evidence; found no routing gaps/orphans/forbidden providers and isolated six lite providers in three shared upgrade modules.
notes: Audit-only control task; discovered runtime fixes become separate slices. Legacy frozen protocols are non-blocking.
scope: Audit all 15 tasks from allowed operations through domain services, kernels, runtime providers, model IDs, and maturity declarations
